headline: Selling A Spread On McDonald's Stock Could Deliver A Big Mac-Sized Return
summary: McDonald's stock is oversold but it may not drop much more. Selling this options spread aims to generate a 19% return in five months.

headline: Rothschild & Co Upgrades McDonald's to Neutral, Raises Price Target to $306
summary: Rothschild & Co  analyst Chris Luyckx    upgrades McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) from Sell to Neutral and raises the price target from $260 to $306.

headline: McDonald's added a lot of new U.S. restaurants in 2025
summary: The fast-food giant opened more locations in the U.S. in 2025 than in any year since 2002, ending the brand's low-growth era

headline: McDonald’s Price Target Hits $341—But Cracks Are Starting to Show
summary: Few blue chips have been as whipsawed by consumer anxiety as the Golden Arches over the past year. But after a blowout Q4 that reignited traffic growth, the story at McDonald’s (NYSE:MCD) is shifting back toward offense. Here is where our proprietary model lands.
